skills.title: Skills
skills.noCustomSkills: No custom skills yet, tap top-right to create

about.title: About
about.desc: All-in-one AI reading assistant. Supports EPUB, PDF, MOBI and more. Local-first, privacy-safe, cross-platform reading experience.

library.emptyHint: Tap the + button to import your first book
library.importSourceSubtitle: Bring books into this shelf from local files or a remote WebDAV library.
library.importSourceLocalDesc: Pick EPUB, PDF, TXT, and other supported files from this device.
library.importSourceSavedWebDavDesc: Browse your remote library with the WebDAV credentials you already saved.
library.importSourceSavedWebDavMissing: You don't have a usable WebDAV setup yet. Connect your library in Sync settings first.
library.importSourceSavedWebDavMissingTitle: No WebDAV library is ready yet
library.importSourceSavedWebDavMissingSecret: We found the WebDAV address, but the password is missing. Save the Sync settings again and then come back.
library.importSourceTemporaryWebDavDesc: Use another WebDAV just for this import without changing your current sync setup.
library.importRemoteRootHint: You can enter any nested path. Leave it blank to start from the WebDAV service base directory.
library.webdavImportRemoteRootPlaceholder: Leave blank to start from the server base directory
library.importAllowInsecureHint: Helpful for self-signed certificates or plain HTTP servers, though HTTPS is still recommended.
library.webdavImportFolderDone: Importable books from this folder have been added to your library.
library.webdavImportSelectedDone: The selected books have been imported into your library.
library.webdavImportNoImportableTitle: There are no importable books in this folder yet
library.webdavImportNoImportableDesc: Try another folder, or keep drilling down into the library.
library.webdavImportLoadingDesc: Preparing this folder so you can start picking books in a moment.
library.webdavImportBrowserSubtitle: Browse the remote folders and pick books for this shelf.
library.webdavImportEmptyFolder: This folder is empty right now
library.webdavImportNoSearchResultsDesc: Try a different keyword, or go up a level and look for books elsewhere.
library.webdavImportEmptyFolderDesc: Browse another directory, or switch to another source and keep exploring.
library.webdavImportUnsupported: This file type is not supported yet
library.webdavImportReady: Pick a few books to bring into this shelf
library.webdavImportSelectionHint: Keep selecting, or import what you've already picked
library.webdavImportFolderHint: {{count}} importable here, {{duplicates}} may already be in your library
library.deleteBookDescription: The book file will be removed from your shelf.
library.preserveDeleteDataHint: Can be restored when you re-import the same book

home.emptyLibrary: Your library is empty, import books to start reading

chat.howCanIHelp: How can I help you today?
chat.askAboutBooks: Ask questions about your books, get summaries, and more
chat.aiAssistantDesc: Analyze content, answer questions, and help you understand your books better.
chat.deepThinkingHint: Enable deeper analysis and reasoning, response time may be longer
chat.spoilerFreeHint: AI will avoid revealing content beyond your current reading position
chat.notConfigured: Please configure an AI model first
chat.notConfiguredDesc: You need to set up an API key and select a model before using AI features.

reader.validEpub: Make sure the book file is a valid EPUB or PDF.
reader.noBookFile: No book file available for book {{bookId}}
reader.reimportMissingPrompt: The local file is missing. Re-import to continue reading.
reader.reimportPickerHint: A file picker will open so you can select the original book file.
reader.reimportPickerHintDesktop: A file picker will open so you can select the original book file.
reader.reimportDialogDescription: Your notes and reading history are intact — just re-import to pick up where you left off.
reader.reimportDialogDescriptionDesktop: Your notes and reading history are intact — just re-import to pick up where you left off.
reader.reimportFailed: Failed to re-import this book. Please try again.
reader.reimportSuccess: Book re-imported successfully. Notes and reading history restored.
reader.reimportDifferentBook: This file does not match the original book, so notes and reading stats can't be restored.
reader.importToStart: Import an EPUB file from the library to start reading.
reader.askQuestion: Ask a question about this text...
reader.hibernated: Tab was hibernated to save memory

translation.deeplBaseUrlHint: Use the base URL. Pasting a full /translate URL is also supported.

notes.title: Notes
notes.selectToCreate: Select text and create a note
notes.emptyHint: Select text while reading to add highlights or notes

notebook.title: Notebook
notebook.emptyHint: Select text in the book to highlight or add notes

bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
bookmarks.emptyHint: Use the bookmark button in the toolbar to mark pages

settings.title: Settings
settings.realtimeHint: All changes are applied in real-time
settings.license: Open source under GPL v3 license
settings.updateReadyMessage: Update downloaded, restart the app to complete installation
settings.updateErrorMessage: Update failed, please try again later
settings.autoSaveDesc: How often to save reading progress
settings.updaterNetworkError: Cannot connect to update server, please check network
settings.updaterNoUpdate: No updates available or service temporarily unavailable
settings.updaterRelaunchFailed: Failed to restart the app. Please reopen it manually to finish installing the update
settings.readingNotice: Font and layout settings only apply to EPUB and other reflowable formats, not PDF.
settings.fixedLayoutNotice: PDF is a fixed layout format. Font and layout settings are not available.
settings.ai_desc: Configure AI endpoints and model settings
settings.ai_baseUrlHint: OpenAI-compatible endpoints append /v1 by default. Enable exact request URL mode if you want to use the URL exactly as entered.
settings.ai_ollamaCorsHint: Can't connect to Ollama? Set the environment variable OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* and restart Ollama.
settings.ai_exactRequestUrlDesc: Use the URL exactly as entered, without automatically appending /v1, /chat/completions, or /models.
settings.ai_exactRequestUrlFetchHint: Exact request URL mode cannot infer the model list automatically. Add a model manually before testing.
settings.ai_noModels: No models — fetch from API or add manually
settings.noSkills: No custom skills yet. Built-in skills are automatically available.
settings.skillDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this skill does
settings.skillPromptPlaceholder: Describe the skill's behavior and output requirements in detail
settings.builtinNameReadOnly: Built-in skill names cannot be modified
settings.skillUsageSummaryDesc: Enter 'summarize this chapter' or 'book summary' in chat
settings.skillUsageCharacterDesc: Ask 'who are the characters' or 'analyze the protagonist'
settings.skillUsageAnalysisDesc: Ask 'what is the author's argument' or 'analyze the logic'
settings.vm_desc: Configure embedding model for semantic search and RAG retrieval
settings.vm_modeBuiltinDesc: Download model to run locally, no API required
settings.vm_builtinDesc: Download lightweight models to run locally within the app. First download is automatically cached.
settings.vm_remoteDesc: Connect to external embedding API service
settings.vm_noRemoteModels: No remote model configurations yet. Add one to use external embedding API.
settings.vm_noModels: No vector model configurations. Add one to enable semantic search.
settings.vm_urlHint: Enter complete embeddings endpoint URL including path (e.g. /v1/embeddings)
settings.vm_model_desc_miniLM: Fast and lightweight, good general quality
settings.syncDesc: Sync reading data across devices via WebDAV
settings.syncRemoteRootDesc: Choose the remote folder used for sync. Nested paths are supported and will be created automatically during test or first sync.
settings.syncIntervalDesc: When auto sync is enabled, check for updates every N minutes
settings.syncAllowInsecureDesc: Skip TLS certificate verification (for self-signed certificates)
settings.syncAllowInsecureDescMobile: Use HTTP instead of HTTPS for self-signed certificate servers
settings.syncWebdavAuthFailed: WebDAV authentication failed. Check the username and app password.
settings.syncWebdavForbidden: WebDAV access was denied. Check account permissions for this path.
settings.syncWebdavNotFound: The WebDAV address or path was not found. Check the server URL and root path.
settings.syncWebdavMethodNotAllowed: The server did not respond correctly to a WebDAV request. Make sure WebDAV is enabled.
settings.syncWebdavTimeout: WebDAV connection timed out after {{seconds}} seconds. Check the server URL, port, and network.
settings.syncWebdavNetworkError: Could not reach the WebDAV server. Check the network, URL, port, or certificate setup.
settings.syncWebdavDesktopScopeError: This desktop build has not allowed that WebDAV address yet. Update to the latest build and restart the app, then try again.
settings.syncWebdavTlsError: WebDAV TLS certificate validation failed. Check the certificate, or allow insecure connections and try again.
settings.syncForceUploadDesc: Overwrite remote database, books, and covers with this device's current data.
settings.syncForceUploadConfirm: Start a full upload? The remote database will be overwritten and matching remote books and covers will be re-uploaded.
settings.syncForceDownloadDesc: Overwrite this device's database, books, and covers with the remote copy.
settings.syncForceDownloadConfirm: Start a full download? This device's database will be overwritten and remote books and covers will be downloaded again.
settings.syncResetDesc: Clear all sync metadata. Use this if sync is having issues.
settings.syncResetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset? This will clear all sync status and perform a full resync next time.
settings.syncDisconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect? Data on this device will not be deleted.
settings.syncConflictDesc: Both local and remote data have changes. Choose which version to keep.
settings.syncLANDescFull: Incrementally import data from another device on the same LAN, merging library changes and downloading missing books and covers.
settings.syncLANServerDesc: Share this device's data for another device to import
settings.syncLANClientDesc: Quickly import library data from another device
settings.syncLANServerHint: Open ReadAny on another device and scan this QR code or enter the pair code to import this device's data there
settings.syncLANConnectionFailed: Connection failed, please check if pair code is correct
settings.syncLANScanHint: Align the scanner with the desktop QR code
settings.syncLANImportWarning: Connecting will incrementally import database changes from the server device and download missing books and covers instead of replacing this device wholesale. If the server has explicit deletions, those deletions will also sync over.
settings.syncLANImportBanner: This LAN import now merges changes and downloads missing files instead of replacing the whole library.
settings.syncLANExpoGoUnsupported: Expo Go does not support the LAN sender because it requires native TCP modules. Please use a custom Dev Client (expo run) or the desktop app.
settings.syncAndroidExpoGoHttpUnsupported: Android Expo Go does not support testing this plain HTTP WebDAV endpoint. Please use HTTPS, or test again in a custom Dev Client / release build.
settings.cameraPermissionDesc: Sync feature needs camera permission to scan QR code
settings.syncLANManualIPHint: Cannot auto-detect IP address. Please enter local LAN IP manually.
settings.syncLANTauriRequired: The LAN sender only works inside the Tauri desktop app. It looks like you're running the browser dev page, so please launch the desktop shell instead.
settings.noModelsFetched: Please fetch model list in AI settings first
settings.storageLocationDesc: Desktop books, covers, and database files are stored here. Changing the directory migrates them together to avoid filling the system drive.
settings.storageMigrationNote: Migration moves imported books, covers, and database files together. After migration, the app restarts automatically and future imports and sync downloads also use the new directory.
settings.storageMigrationSuccess: Migrated {{count}} files. The app will restart shortly.
settings.storageNoChange: This directory is already in use

addBook.desc: Click here to import EPUB, PDF, and other supported formats.

bookList.title: Your Library
bookList.desc: All your imported books will appear here. Click any book to start reading.

settings.desc: Configure AI provider, translation engine, and more.

sync.title: Multi-Platform Sync
sync.desc: Choose WebDAV, S3, or LAN sync to keep your library in sync across devices. Supports QR code pairing for quick setup.

mindmap.zoomHint: Double click to zoom · Pinch to zoom · Drag to move

welcome.title: Welcome to ReadAny
welcome.subtitle: Your intelligent reading companion. Let's set up the perfect reading environment.

ai.title: AI Configuration
ai.desc: Set up your AI provider to enable smart dialogue and summarization.

appearance.title: Appearance & Language
appearance.desc: Choose ReadAny's display language and theme preferences.

sync.title: Cloud Sync
sync.desc: Keep your reading progress perfectly synced across devices via WebDAV.

translation.title: Translation Engine
translation.desc: Configure your preferred translation engine for seamless bilingual reading.

embedding.title: Smart Retrieval
embedding.desc: Configure vector model to enable powerful semantic search
embedding.localDesc: Runs completely offline on your device
embedding.remoteInfoDesc: Remote mode uses the embedding API of your configured AI provider. Please ensure you have configured an AI provider in the previous step.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.desc: All configurations are ready. You can modify these options anytime in Settings. Now you can import books, chat with AI, or start exploring!

stats.title: Reading Statistics
stats.subtitle: See your reading across today, this week, this month, this year, and all time
stats.chartDesc: Reading time distribution over the selected period
stats.heatmapDesc: Your reading activity over the past year
stats.trendDesc: Reading time trend over the past 30 days
stats.noBooksInPeriod: No reading records in this period
stats.noData: Start reading to see your stats!

desktop.pageSubtitle: See your reading across today, this week, this month, this year, and all time in one place.
desktop.periodNavigationHint: Move between periods or jump directly with the date picker.
desktop.journeySubtitle: From your first session to today, the time, books, and rhythm you've built live here.
desktop.readingCalendarDesc: Book covers appear directly on the days you actually read them this month.
desktop.primaryChartDesc: Each period emphasizes a different rhythm of time and focus.
desktop.readingHeatmapDesc: A month-at-a-glance heat layer that makes your most immersive reading days stand out immediately.
desktop.singlePointDesc: This period only has one data point so far, so the key number takes center stage.
desktop.topBooksDesc: Ranked by reading time in the selected period.
desktop.insightsDesc: Patterns, consistency, and standout focus moments from this period.
desktop.rhythmProfileDesc: See when you like to read and what kinds of books keep pulling you back in.
desktop.timeOfDayDesc: Your strongest reading windows gradually turn into a recognizable rhythm over time.
desktop.categoryDistributionDesc: A quick view of where your reading time goes by tag or subject.
desktop.annualShelfDesc: A compact strip of recent years so your long-term reading story feels like a real almanac.
desktop.milestonesDesc: All-time view adds memorable moments along your full reading journey.
desktop.sharePreviewDesc: Image export comes next. For now, this previews the hierarchy and mood.
desktop.noDataTitle: No reading activity in this period yet
desktop.noDataDesc: Read a little and this page will begin to tell a much richer story.
desktop.noTopBooks: No standout books in this period yet.
desktop.noInsights: Once you read more, this panel will start surfacing patterns.
desktop.noTimeline: An hourly timeline comes next. For now, here's the daily snapshot.
desktop.daySummaryDesc: A quick read on today's cadence and focus window.
desktop.companionMessage: ReadAny has been with you for
desktop.journeyNarrative: ReadAny has been with you for {{days}} days, quietly keeping track of every reading session, every long focus stretch, and every book you stayed with.
desktop.heroNarrativeDay: You spent {{time}} reading today across {{sessions}} sessions.
desktop.heroNarrativeWeek: You kept a reading rhythm on {{days}} days this week, with your longest focus stretch reaching {{longest}}.
desktop.heroNarrativeMonth: This month has already turned {{time}} into reading time across at least {{books}} books.
desktop.heroNarrativeYear: So far this year, you've already given {{time}} to reading, across {{activeDays}} active reading days.
desktop.heroNarrativeLifetime: Since {{date}}, reading has slowly become part of your long-term rhythm.
desktop.insightBodyNoReading: Read a little and this view will quickly begin to show your rhythm, focus, and preferences.
desktop.insightTitleStreak: A reading streak is taking shape
desktop.insightBodyStreak: You kept reading for {{days}} consecutive days in this period.
desktop.insightTitleFocus: A deep focus session showed up
desktop.insightBodyFocus: Your longest reading session reached {{minutes}} minutes.
desktop.insightBodyTopBook: "{{title}}" was the book you spent the most time with in this period.
desktop.milestoneBodyJoined: You started tracking your reading with ReadAny on {{date}}.
desktop.goalsDesc: Set targets and track your progress toward them.
desktop.goalsDescMonthly: Set and track the goals for this month.
desktop.goalsDescYearly: Set and track your reading goals for this year.
desktop.noGoals: No goals set yet. Tap "Set goal" to get started.
desktop.streakAtRiskBody: Keep the flame alive — even a few minutes of reading counts.
desktop.badgesDesc: Milestones unlocked through your reading journey.
desktop.noBadges: Keep reading to earn your first badge!
desktop.sharePreviewDesc: Generate a badge poster you can share or save locally.
desktop.badgeSaveSuccessDesc: Your badge poster has been saved to the photo library.
desktop.badgeSavePermissionDenied: Photo library permission is required to save the poster.
desktop.badge_notes-1_desc: Made your first highlight or note
desktop.badge_early-bird_desc: Over half your reading happens before 8am
desktop.badge_night-owl_desc: Over half your reading happens after 10pm
desktop.badge_weekend-warrior_desc: Over 70% of your reading days are weekends
desktop.badge_perfect-week_desc: Read every day for an entire week

vectorize.showingChunks: Showing all chunks for this book...
vectorize.indexBook: Index '{{title}}' for AI-powered search and analysis.
vectorize.description: This will split the book into chunks and generate embeddings for semantic search.

vectorize.notConfiguredDesc: You need to download a built-in model or configure a remote vector model before vectorizing.

tts.settingsDesc: Configure TTS engine, voice and playback parameters

tts.dashscopeEngineDesc: High-quality cloud voice, requires API key
tts.sleepTimerSubtitle: Stop narration automatically after your chosen time.
tts.sleepTimerPrompt: Set a sleep timer in minutes
tts.apiKeyHint: Get API key from Alibaba Cloud, use qwen3-tts-flash model
tts.waitingText: The current spoken excerpt will appear here once playback starts.
tts.keepInSync: Narration stays aligned with your current reading position.
tts.currentPageOnly: Will continue with the rest of the current page.
tts.testText: This is a test voice. ReadAny reads for you.

tts.browserVoiceNote: Choose the system voice in your device settings

fonts.title: Fonts

fonts.importDesc: Import from a local file or online URL

fonts.nameFontDesc: Enter a display name for this font
fonts.emptyHint: Click the button above to import a font file
